---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## ✨ Feature Request

**Clear and concise description of the feature**

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Include examples or pseudocode if helpful.

## 🤔 Alternative Solutions

Any alternative approaches considered?

## 📊 Additional Context

- Related issues or discussions
- Priority (P0/P1/P2)
- Impact assessment

## 🔐 Guardian Law Alignment

How does this feature align with AIOS Guardian Laws?

| Law | Impact | Alignment |
|-----|--------|-----------|
| G1: Unity | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G2: Harmony | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G3: Rhythm | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G4: Causality | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G5: Transparency | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G6: Authenticity | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G7: Privacy | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G8: Nonmaleficence | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| G9: Sustainability | | ✅/⚠️/❌ |

**Summary:** If any CRITICAL law (G7, G8) is affected, detail the mitigation strategy.

## 📈 Success Criteria

- [ ] Feature implementation complete
- [ ] Unit tests pass (≥80% coverage)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Guardian Law compliance verified
- [ ] Performance impact assessed (<200ms latency maintained)
